LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_Boots.description: A simple pair of leather boots.
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_Boots.label: boots
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_Shoes.description: A fancy pair of leather shoes.
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_Shoes.label: shoes
LanguageData.VAE_Handwear_Gloves.label: gloves
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_BuildersJacket.description: A jacket with highly reflective properties and a colour that is easily discernible from any background.\n\nMost industrial employees wear it as part of their personal protective equipment.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_BuildersJacket.label: Builder's Jacket
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_CasualTShirt.description: A casual T-Shirt with a cool sticker on it.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_CasualTShirt.label: Casual T-Shirt
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_ChefsUniform.description: A thick cloth coat protects from the heat of stoves and splattering of boiling liquids.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_ChefsUniform.label: Chef's Uniform
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_DoctorScrubs.description: Sanitary clothing worn by surgeons, nurses and other workers involved in patient care. They are designed to be simple, easy to launder and cheap to replace if damaged or stained.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_DoctorScrubs.label: Doctor Scrubs
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_FleeceShirt.description: A soft, checkered, breathable shirt perfect for working in the field.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_FleeceShirt.label: Fleece Shirt
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Hoodie.description: A warm casual hoodie that doesn’t limit wearer’s movement.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Hoodie.label: hoodie
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Jeans.description: A pair of thick enough jeans to provide some degree of protection from damage and cold.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Jeans.label: jeans
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Jumpsuit.description: A full body jumpsuit made out of thick fabric or leather. Excellent for general body protection and manual labour.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Jumpsuit.label: Jumpsuit
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LabCoat.description: A light coat worn to protect clothing from substances used in a lab.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LabCoat.label: Lab Coat
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_MilitaryJacket.description: A thick fabric military formal jacket used for certain ceremonies, receptions and celebrations. It contains orders, medals insignia and campaign ribbons. It is considered a symbol of courage and valor.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_MilitaryJacket.label: Military Jacket
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_MilitaryUniform.description: A thick, protective coverall with a military camouflage.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_MilitaryUniform.label: Military Uniform
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Overalls.description: A pair of bib-and-brace overalls perfect for working in the field.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Overalls.label: overalls
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_SheriffShirt.description: A formal, thick buttoned-down shirt with a sheriff star on the chest. Provides wearer with a sense of pride and accomplishment.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_SheriffShirt.label: Sheriff Shirt
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_ShirtandTie.description: A nice looking collared shirt with buttons and a tie.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_ShirtandTie.label: Shirt and Tie
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Shorts.description: A pair of shorts, perfect for hot summer days.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Shorts.label: shorts
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Skirt.label: skirt
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_SuitJacket.label: Suit jacket
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TankTop.description: A sleeveless type of T-shirt, useful during prolonged exercise.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TankTop.label: Tank Top
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Trousers.description: A nice looking set of suit trousers.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Trousers.label: trousers
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Fedora.description: A nice looking hat with a soft brim and indented crown.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Fedora.label: fedora
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Apron.description: A leather or cloth apron covering legs, waist and chest.\n\nApron like that is often used by craftsmen, doctors and chefs due to useful pockets and protection it provides.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Apron.label: apron
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Blouse.description: Very light and thin blouse, great for hot climates.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Blouse.label: blouse
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Cape.description: A loose cloak fastened around the neck of the wearer. It is believed that a cloak functions as a talisman of valour on the battlefield.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Cape.label: cloak
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Tunic.description: Slightly heavier than a normal shirt, a tunic is a great isolation against cold weather.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Tunic.label: tunic
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_SummerHat.description: A light straw or fabric hat which serves as a protection against sun rays.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_SummerHat.label: Summer Hat
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_TrapperHat.description: An extremely warm hat with ear coverings, perfect for long cold exposure in winter times.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_TrapperHat.label: Trapper Hat
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PeltCoat.description: A heavy coat insulated due to animal pelt, providing warmth and armor.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PeltCoat.label: Pelt Coat
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TribalKilt.description: A kilt crafted using neolithic tools. While it may look primitive, it is effective at insulating the wearer.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TribalKilt.label: Tribal Kilt
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TribalPoncho.description: A poncho crafted using neolithic tools. While it may look primitive, it is effective at insulating the wearer.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_TribalPoncho.label: Tribal Poncho
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Hood.description: A thick hood made out of reinforced cloth or leather. Provides mediocre protection against cold and damage.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Hood.label: hood
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_BaseballCap.description: A type of soft cap with a rounded crown and a stiff peak protecting the front.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_BaseballCap.label: Baseball Cap
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Beret.description: A soft, flat crowned hat. Often worn by the military as a symbol of valor.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Beret.label: military beret
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_ChefsToque.description: A tall, round, pleated hat usually worn by the chefs.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_ChefsToque.label: Chef's Toque
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_GasMask.description: A full face isolating mask with basic air filtration systems, providing some degree of toxic immunity.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_GasMask.label: Gas Mask
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Glasses.description: A pair of correction glasses, providing users with some degree of psychic immunity.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Glasses.label: Glasses
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Hardhat.description: A type of helmet predominantly used in a work environment. Provides high protection against blunt trauma.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Hardhat.label: Hardhat
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Scarf.description: A warm and long piece of fabric protecting the neck from exposure to cold.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Scarf.label: scarf
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Sunglasses.description: A pair of sunglasses protecting the wearer from dangerous UV rays. Often considered to be ‘cool’.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Sunglasses.label: Sunglasses
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_SurgicalMask.description: Sanitary mask worn by the surgeons, nurses and other workers involved in patient care.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_SurgicalMask.label: Surgical Mask
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_MarineBoots.description: A pair of marine boots with layered plasteel plates and enhanced servomotors.
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_MarineBoots.label: marine boots
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_PlateBoots.description: A pair of simple plate boots. Due to their weight, they slow down the wearer.
LanguageData.VAE_Footwear_PlateBoots.label: plate boots
LanguageData.VAE_Handwear_MarineGloves.description: A pair of marine gloves with enhanced grip assistance and set of embedded recoil stabilisers.
LanguageData.VAE_Handwear_MarineGloves.label: marine gloves
LanguageData.VAE_Handwear_PlateGloves.description: A pair of simple metal gloves. Due to the thickness of the material, they reduce general work speed of the wearer.
LanguageData.VAE_Handwear_PlateGloves.label: plate gloves
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_AdvancedVest.description: A lightweight combat vest with complex design, reinforced with plasteel. Does nothing to protect the limbs.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_AdvancedVest.label: advanced vest
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_BulletproofVest.description: A vest with Kevlar plates inserted on the chest and back. While quite effective against gunfire, it does nothing to protect from melee weapons.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_BulletproofVest.label: bulletproof vest
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_GhillieSuit.description: A camouflage clothing designed to resemble the environment. Gives user more time to aim precisely, but provides little to no defence.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_GhillieSuit.label: ghillie suit
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_HAZMATSuit.description: A full body, impermeable piece of protective equipment providing a full protection against psychic and toxic effect.\n\nIt limits the movement and manipulation of the wearer as well as provides no defense against any form of attack.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_HAZMATSuit.label: HAZMAT suit
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Chainmail.description: A coat of armor made out of small metal rings linked together forming a mesh, separated from the body with cloth padding.\n\nBeing quite heavy, this piece of armor slows down the wearer.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Chainmail.label: chainmail
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Chestplate.description: A metal chest plate providing the wearer with a high protection against most damage but limiting the movement considerably.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Chestplate.label: chestplate
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Gambeson.description: A padded defensive jacket providing medium isolation from cold temperatures.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Gambeson.label: gambeson
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LightPlateArmor.description: Overlapping solid plates of armor covering the chest and shoulders.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LightPlateArmor.label: light plate armor
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PlateHelmet.description: A plate helmet which gives moderate protection against sharp attacks.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PlateHelmet.label: plate helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PlateShoulderpads.descriptio: A pair of simple metal shoulder plates.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_PlateShoulderpads.label: plate shoulderpads
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_QuiltedVest.description: A quilted defensive vest to be worn under armour for extra protection.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_QuiltedVest.label: quilted vest
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_WoodenArmor.description: A vest with wooden logs and planks covering the front and back. Quite effective against small calibre gunshots and sharp melee weapons, but completely useless against blunt hits and rifle shots.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_WoodenArmor.label: wooden armor
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_StoneWarMask.description: An artistically terrifying war mask. Hides the wearer's face and makes them more confident. Being made out of stone, it is very durable but also incredibly heavy.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_StoneWarMask.label: stone war mask
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RiotArmor.description: A thick jacket with armor plates inserted on chests, arms, legs and back. Very effective at protecting against blunt trauma, this kind of armor is often used by riot police and heavy infantry alike.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RiotArmor.label: riot armor
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RiotHelmet.description: A heavy combat helmet with a face covering plate. Often used by riot police units due to its effectiveness at protecting against blunt trauma.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RiotHelmet.label: riot helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Shield_Riot.description: An industrial heavy shield made out of reinforced steel. Provides a lot of protection against blunt damage, which makes it ideal for urbworld riot police.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_Shield_Riot.label: riot shield
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RoyalSiegeArmor.description: A suit of heavy powered armor, built for increased protection while still maintaining mobility. Heavy layered plasteel-weave plates paired with a built-in energy shield emitter stop most attacks. Neuro-memetic assistors allow a human to wear this armor without immobilizing them entirely.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RoyalSiegeArmor.label: prestige siegebreaker armor
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RoyalTrooperArmor.descriptio: A suit of light minimally-powered armor. Lightweight plasteel-weave plates block attacks, and neuro-memetic assistors in the lower body redistribute weight carried by its user. It is slimmer than other powered armor and can fit under clothes.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_RoyalTrooperArmor.label: prestige trooper armor
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_RoyalSiegeHelmet.descriptio: A heavily-armored high-tech helmet, with a solid plasteel-weave shell and omni-spectrum camera.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_RoyalSiegeHelmet.label: prestige siegebreaker helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_RoyalTrooperHelmet.descript: A high-tech and lightweight armored helmet with a protective plasteel-weave plate.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_RoyalTrooperHelmet.label: prestige trooper helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_HeavyMarineArmor.description: A suit of heavy powered armor. Double layers of plasteel-weave plates are incredibly effective at both projectiles and explosions. Neuro-memetic assistors allow a human to wear the armor and still move easily. A built in blast shield allows wearer to survive a direct rocket hit, upon which the shields require time to recharge.\n\nArmor like this is often used by imperial heavy stormtroopers during mechanoid conflicts, as it transforms a soldier into a humanoid tank.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_HeavyMarineArmor.label: heavy marine armor
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LightMarineArmor.description: A suit of light semi-powered armor. Thin plasteel plates are effective at stopping small calibre gunshots and melee attacks whilst also permitting the user to move quickly and undetected.\n\nArmor like this is often used by imperial scouting parties.
LanguageData.VAE_Apparel_LightMarineArmor.label: light marine armor
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_HeavyMarineHelmet.descripti: A heavy marine armor helmet, with double-layered plasteel plating and a built-in camera with a display HUD to get rid of the weakpoints like visors.\n\nArmor like this is often used by imperial heavy stormtroopers during mechanoid conflicts, as it transforms a soldier into a humanoid tank.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_HeavyMarineHelmet.label: heavy marine helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_LightMarineHelmet.descripti: A light marine armor helmet, providing wearer with advanced situational awareness and protection despite having an exposed lower half of the face.\n\nArmor like this is often used by imperial scouting parties.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_LightMarineHelmet.label: light marine helmet
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Balaclava.description: A full face textile mask. Hides the mimic and makes hard to read.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_Balaclava.label: balaclava
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_BallisticGoggles.descriptio: A pair of reinforced goggles capable of stopping a bullet.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_BallisticGoggles.label: ballistic goggles
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_GhillieHood.description: A camouflage hood designed to resemble the environment. Gives user more time to aim precisely, but provides little to no defence.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_GhillieHood.label: ghillie hood
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask.description: A full head gas mask, which alongside the HAZMAT suit provides a full protection from toxic and psychic effects.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask.label: HAZMAT mask
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_NightVisionGoggles.descript: A set of night vision goggles allowing the wearer to fire weapons with higher precision.
LanguageData.VAE_Headgear_NightVisionGoggles.label: night vision goggles
LanguageData.VHE_TableBarber.description: A table equipped with various tools suited for restyling hair and beards.
LanguageData.VHE_TableBarber.label: barber's table
LanguageData.VHE_Filth_Hair.label: hair
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeEMPBelt.description: Electromagnetic pulse grenades damaging to electronic equipment strapped to a belt. They can be thrown a short distance, where they'll explode, disabling any electronics for a brief duration.
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeEMPBelt.label: EMP grenade belt
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeEMPBelt.verbs.0.label: throw EMP grenade
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeFragBelt.description: Old-school fragmentation grenades strapped to a belt. They can be thrown a short distance, where they'll explode, damaging anything and anyone nearby. Can be reloaded using frag grenades.
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeFragBelt.label: frag grenade belt
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeMolotovBelt.descripti: Glass bottles filled with flammable liquid, with a burning cloth in the neck, strapped to a belt. A favorite weapon of hooligans and desperate warriors from rim to rim. They can be thrown a short distance, where they'll explode, damaging anything and anyone nearby, setting chemfuel on fire. Can be reloaded using molotovs.
LanguageData.VWE_Apparel_GrenadeMolotovBelt.label: molotov belt
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.description: A large, two handed, shaped stick for bashing enemies. Extreme weight at the end of this tool allows user to crush flesh and bones alike, leaving enemies maimed, paralysed and often dead.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.label: heavy club
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_HeavyClub.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.description: A small, one handed club. Whilst it's fast to swing, it is not going to cause tremendous damage due to its low weight and short length.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.label: light club
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_LightClub.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.description: One of mankind's oldest manufactured objects. A shiv is a short but sharp piece of rock or metal with a small handle.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.label: shiv
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.tools.0.label: blade
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_Shiv.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.description: A sharp piece of rock mounted on a sturdy piece of wood. Often used as a tool, it has been recorded that tribal axes also served as a great weapon due to their small size and ability to inflict deep wounds.
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.label: tribal axe
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_MeleeWeapon_TribalAxe.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.VWE_FlyingShard.label: shard
LanguageData.VWE_Proj_FireBomb.label: fire bomb
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.description: A small pouch in the middle of two lengths of cord. Used to slingshot sharp rocks over medium distance.
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.label: sling
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.tools.0.label: sling
LanguageData.VWE_SlingRock.label: sling rock
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.description: A set of crude rock or metal shards that can be thrown a short distance.
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.label: throwing shards
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.2.label: point
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.description: A small clay pot with various flammable substances inside - be it chemfuel, cloth, gunpowder or animal fats.
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.label: fire bombs
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.verbs.0.label: throw firebomb
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_AmmoPack.description: Bandolier with ammunition. Decreases cooldown of all ranged weapons by 25%.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_AmmoPack.label: ammo pack
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_BattleBanner.description: A battle banner. Gives the wearer a fighting spirit and confidence. Increases resistance to pain.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_BattleBanner.label: battle banner
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_ExplosiveBelt.description: A belt with explosive shells. Will detonate upon user's death.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_ExplosiveBelt.label: explosive belt
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_MedicBag.description: A bag with everything needed to provide medical treatment. Increases tend quality and surgery success chance.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_MedicBag.label: medic bag
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_MiniTurretPack.comps.0.verb: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a shoulder.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_MiniTurretPack.description: A small pack of ammunition and components that control a shoulder mounted mini-turret.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_MiniTurretPack.label: mini-turret pack
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_Quiver.description: Small quiver for arrows. Increases firing rate of all neolithic and medieval weapons.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_Quiver.label: quiver
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_RangedShieldBelt.descriptio: A projectile-repulsion device. It will attempt to stop incoming projectiles or shrapnel, but does nothing against melee attacks or heat. It doesn't prevent the wearer from firing out, and shuts down instantly if hit by EMP.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_RangedShieldBelt.label: ranged shield belt
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_RessurectorBelt.description: A belt containing a dose of resurrector serum. Injects the serum immediately after death.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_RessurectorBelt.label: ressurector belt
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_ToolBelt.description: A simple tool belt with everything needed to nail a couple of planks or fix electrical appliances.
LanguageData.VAEA_Apparel_ToolBelt.label: tool belt
LanguageData.VTE_TradingTerminal.description: A terminal that allows contact with the bank, access to stock market, price overview and contracts.
LanguageData.VTE_TradingTerminal.label: trading terminal
LanguageData.Outpost_PowerGrid_DeliverySpot.descripti: Designates a spot for power from power grid outpost to be delivered to.
LanguageData.Outpost_PowerGrid_DeliverySpot.label: power grid outlet
LanguageData.PowerTransmissionTower.description: Tower for power transmission outside the colony.
LanguageData.PowerTransmissionTower.label: power transmission tower
LanguageData.Airdrop.label: Airdrop
LanguageData.Mote_Smoke_CannonSmall.label: smoke
LanguageData.ProjectileSkyfaller.label: Projectile skyfaller
LanguageData.RB_FloorLamp.description: A floor-mounted lamp that lights an area using electricity. It is less powerful than a standing lamp, but can be build on any floor.
LanguageData.RB_FloorLamp.label: floor lamp
LanguageData.RB_GravshipPanoramaHull.description: A massive glass facade offers an uninterrupted view of space. Built as part of the gravship’s substructure, this airtight hall combines structural integrity with breathtaking visibility. Only constructible on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_GravshipPanoramaHull.label: gravship panorama hull
LanguageData.RB_GravshipWindowHull.description: An airtight wall embedded with pressure-resistant viewing windows. Designed for safe stargazing, this hall integrates directly into the gravship’s structural framework. Can only be constructed on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_GravshipWindowHull.label: gravship glasshull
LanguageData.RB_SmoothGravshipHull.description: A weaker airtight wall that prevents oxygen leaks in the vacuum of space. The wall connects directly into the underlying substructure, meaning it can only be built on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_SmoothGravshipHull.label: gravship hull
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Glass.description: The outer structural elements of a ship's hull. Does not include conduits for power or coolant.
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Glass.label: ship hull (glass)
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Viewport.description: The outer structural elements of a ship's hull. Does not include conduits for power or coolant.
LanguageData.RB_Ship_Beam_Viewport.label: ship hull (viewport)
LanguageData.RB_CellWall.description: An impassable wall consisting of metal bars.
LanguageData.RB_CellWall.label: cell wall
LanguageData.RB_ClerestoryWall.description: An impassable half-glass wall. Capable of holding up a roof, but more fragile than a normal wall. Does not block light, providing a growing bonus to plants near them. Slowly refills peoples outdoor need.
LanguageData.RB_ClerestoryWall.label: clerestory wall
LanguageData.RB_DoubleAutodoor.description: Divides rooms. Powered operation allows people to move through the door without slowing down.
LanguageData.RB_DoubleAutodoor.label: double autodoor
LanguageData.RB_DoubleDoor.description: Divides rooms. Simple doors must be manually opened, which slows people down. The amount of slowdown depends on what the door is made of.
LanguageData.RB_DoubleDoor.label: double door
LanguageData.RB_Fireplace.description: A stone fireplace. As with all heat sources, it must be placed indoors so it has a closed space to heat. Refuelable with wood.
LanguageData.RB_Fireplace.label: fireplace
LanguageData.RB_GlassAutodoor.description: Divides rooms. Powered operation allows people to move through the door without slowing down.
LanguageData.RB_GlassAutodoor.label: glass autodoor
LanguageData.RB_GlassWall.description: An impassable glass wall. Capable of holding up a roof, but far more fragile than a normal wall. Does not block light, providing a growing bonus to plants near them. Slowly refills peoples outdoor need.
LanguageData.RB_GlassWall.label: glass wall
LanguageData.RB_LargeOrnateDoor.description: Divides rooms. An intricately-carved door, decorated with gold. This large, heavy door requires adjacent walls to function.
LanguageData.RB_LargeOrnateDoor.label: large ornate door
LanguageData.RB_OrnateWall.description: An intricate and impassable wall, decorated with gold. Capable of holding up a roof, but more fragile than a normal wall. Dignity-focused psycaster will receive a meditation bonus when meditating near them.
LanguageData.RB_OrnateWall.label: ornate wall
LanguageData.RB_OverwallArmor.description: A durable, reinforced armor that seamlessly integrates with existing walls. Provides enhanced protection against external threats while maintaining structural integrity. It will protect the wall under it from damage until destroyed. Must be constructed on an existing wall.
LanguageData.RB_OverwallArmor.label: wall armor
LanguageData.RB_OverwallFireplace.description: A stone fireplace build into an existing wall. As with all heat sources, it must be placed indoors so it has a closed space to heat. Refuelable with wood.
LanguageData.RB_OverwallFireplace.label: wall-mounted fireplace
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedClerestoryWall.description: An impassable half-glass wall. Capable of holding up a roof. Does not block light, providing a growing bonus to plants near them. Slowly refills peoples outdoor need.
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedClerestoryWall.label: reinforced clerestory wall
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedGlassAutodoor.description: Divides rooms. Powered operation allows people to move through the door without slowing down.
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedGlassAutodoor.label: reinforced glass autodoor
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedGlassWall.description: An impassable reinforced glass wall. Capable of holding up a roof. Does not block light, providing a growing bonus to plants near them. Slowly refills peoples outdoor need.
LanguageData.RB_ReinforcedGlassWall.label: reinforced glass wall
LanguageData.RB_RusticWall.description: A simplistic, weak and impassable wall. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.RB_RusticWall.label: rustic wall
LanguageData.RB_LargeSecurityDoor.description: A heavily reinforced door. It is slow to open and requires electricity, but is very strong. It's a good choice if you want to keep something dangerous out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.RB_LargeSecurityDoor.label: large security door
LanguageData.RB_CellDoor.description: A slow moving door that separates two rooms.
LanguageData.RB_CellDoor.label: cell door
LanguageData.RB_BarriersWall.description: An impassable wall consisting of metal bars that allow water to pass through. Must be constructed in water.
LanguageData.RB_BarriersWall.label: barriers wall
LanguageData.RB_ACUnitFloor.description: An air-conditioning machine that fits into a floor tile. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts.
LanguageData.RB_ACUnitFloor.label: floor AC unit
LanguageData.RB_Filth_BallisticGlassShards.label: glass shards
LanguageData.RB_Filth_GlassShards.label: glass shards
LanguageData.RB_BallisticGlass.description: Toughened, multi-layered transparent armor capable of withstanding bullets and explosions, crucial for protecting high-value targets and ensuring safety in hostile environments.
LanguageData.RB_BallisticGlass.label: ballistic glass
LanguageData.RB_Glass.description: Transparent, brittle sheets of silica-based material, widely utilised for windows and various other applications where clarity and rigidity are essential.
LanguageData.RB_Glass.label: glass
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_Gag.description: An uncomfortable piece of fabric which covers the wearer's mouth, preventing them from speaking. Psychologically suppresses the wearer, but effectively prevents them from interacting socially with others.
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_Gag.label: gag
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_StraitJacket.description: An uncomfortable jacket with crossed sleeves that restrain the movement of the wearer. It psychologically suppresses them, reducing the chance of a slave rebellion. It also prevents the wearer from doing any harm to themselves and others by removing their ability to move their arms.
LanguageData.VAEI_Apparel_StraitJacket.label: straitjacket
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidDrawing.label: void drawing
